title: Verifier result
description: Output of one verification of an artifact against the acceptance contract. The maker is never the sole source of this.

checked_goal_version.description: goal_version this result was judged against; if it differs from current, re-evaluate.

independent_of_maker.description: False is a red flag: the maker should not be the sole acceptance authority.

score.description: Optional scalar score; prefer pairwise comparison for boundary cases.

confidence.description: Verifier confidence. Do not escalate on a model's self-reported confidence alone.

evidence_ref.description: Pointer to raw verifier evidence (logs, diffs).

false_accept_risk.description: Calibration signal; false-acceptance rate is the key safety metric.

escalate.description: True on observable triggers: verifier disagreement, out-of-range input, high-impact action, repeated failure fingerprint.
